metaDescription: DeepSeek-V4-Flash (DeepSeek), released 2026-04-24 — part of the DeepSeek V4 line. Smaller, faster V4 tier: 284B total / 13B active MoE, 1M-token context, MIT-l…
overview: DeepSeek-V4-Flash is a large language model from DeepSeek, part of the DeepSeek V4 line. Released 2026-04-24. Flagship Mixture-of-Experts text model line with a native 1M-token context, shipped in a larger Pro tier and a faster, cheaper Flash tier.

What's notable in this version: Smaller, faster V4 tier: 284B total / 13B active MoE, 1M-token context, MIT-licensed. Cheapest tier at $0.14/M input (miss) / $0.28/M output; legacy deepseek-chat & deepseek-reasoner now alias its non-thinking and thinking modes.
